name: SYS · Portal Usage Report
css: PORTAL THEME TOKENS — map Zuar Portal CSS variables to local tokens.
Each references a portal var with a hard fallback so the block still
renders correctly in isolation (preview, export, missing theme).
/* Tint of brand colors for soft fills */
SECTION HEADINGS (flat, hairline, FA icon in accent)
/* Hide an insight (and its icon) when the data sentence is empty */
.user-entry .user-name { color: var(--rpt-text); overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.top-users-table td { padding: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rpt-hairline); vertical-align: middle; }
.activity-bar-container { height: 4px; background: var(--rpt-track); border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; }
.page-table-wrap { max-height: 360px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid var(--rpt-hairline); border-radius: var(--rpt-radius-sm); }
.page-table tbody td { padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rpt-hairline); }
.page-table td.num { text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; white-space: nowrap; }
.page-table .page-cell { max-width: 360px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.stickiness-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--rpt-secondary); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
.cohort-head { text-align: left !important; color: var(--rpt-faint); font-weight: 600; font-size: 10.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; }
.cohort-label { text-align: left !important; color: var(--rpt-text); font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; }
/* Popover content (injected per icon from INFO_DEFS) */
transition: opacity 0.14s ease, transform 0.14s ease, visibility 0s linear 0.14s;
.info-icon.flip-up .info-pop { top: auto; bottom: calc(100% + 8px); transform: translateY(4px); }
/* Reveal on hover, keyboard focus, or pinned click */
.drilldown-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; font-size: 15px; color: #fff; word-break: break-all; }
.dd-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 8px 18px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.dd-h4 { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--rpt-text); margin-bottom: 8px; }
.dd-list li b { color: var(--rpt-primary); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
.link-cell { cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px dotted transparent; transition: color 0.12s ease, border-color 0.12s ease; }
@keyframes rpt-rise { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
.engagement-tier-card { box-shadow: none; animation: none; break-inside: avoid; }

// ECharts CDN (pinned). UMD bundle — must be loaded with the AMD-hide cure.
// Date filter presets (relative presets anchor to TODAY)
// Required columns from the flat query schema
const MAX_SANKEY_NODES = 12;               // top pages kept as flow nodes; tail -> "Other"
const NAV_TOP_TRANSITIONS = 12;            // ranked page->page transitions shown as bars
const TREEMAP_TOP_N    = 20;               // top pages shown individually in treemap
const COHORT_MAX_WEEKS = 8;                // columns W0..W7 in the cohort grid
// Metric definitions surfaced by the info icons. Keyed by data-info attribute.
what: 'Unique users who viewed at least one page during the selected period.',
why: 'Overall adoption and reach of the portal across your organization.',
what: 'Distinct calendar days that had any portal activity in the period.',
why: 'Consistency of engagement — more active days means more sustained usage.',
what: 'Users who visited on more than one distinct day during the period.',
why: 'Identifies your stickiest users and signals recurring, habitual value.',
what: 'Share of all users who were active on more than one day.',
why: 'Loyalty indicator — higher rates mean users keep coming back.',
what: 'Share of sessions that touched only one distinct page. Sessions split on 30 min of inactivity; page refreshes do not count as a second page.',
why: 'Lower is better — high bounce suggests users do not find a reason to go deeper. Target under 30%.',
what: 'Average and median session length, measured from first to last view (the final page\u2019s dwell time is not counted). 30-min inactivity boundary.',
why: 'Longer sessions usually mean deeper engagement; the median guards against a few very long outliers.',
what: 'Average number of distinct pages viewed per session, plus the spread across 1 / 2\u20135 / 6+ pages.',
why: 'Breadth of exploration within a visit. The single-page segment equals the bounce set.',
what: 'Average days between a user\u2019s visits, with a separate average for users who return within a week.',
why: 'Shorter gaps mean the portal is part of a regular workflow rather than an occasional stop.',
what: 'Every PAGE_VIEW event across all users in the period.',
why: 'Overall content-consumption volume and engagement depth.',
what: 'Number of distinct pages that received at least one view.',
why: 'Content breadth — how much of the portal users actually touch.',
what: 'The single page with the most views, and its share of total views.',
why: 'Your highest-demand content; informs what to prioritize and promote.',
what: 'Users split into Power / Regular / Light by average views-per-active-day (66th and 33rd percentiles).',
why: 'Shows whether engagement is concentrated in a few heavy users or spread out. Thresholds recompute for each selected period.',
what: 'The most common page-to-page hops within a session (30-min boundary). Self-refreshes excluded; low-traffic pages grouped as "Other".',
why: 'Reveals the routes users actually take through the portal.',
what: 'Each page\u2019s share of total page views in the period, sized by view count.',
why: 'At-a-glance view of where attention concentrates.',
what: 'Every page with views, unique viewers, % of traffic, and an estimated average time on page (gap to the next in-session view).',
why: 'Full content inventory — sort or search to audit any page. "Avg Time" is an estimate, not true dwell time.',
what: 'Daily, 7-day rolling, and 30-day rolling counts of unique users.',
why: 'Rising WAU/MAU with flat DAU signals a widening but less frequent audience.',
what: 'Average DAU divided by average MAU over the period, as a percentage.',
why: 'Core habit metric — the share of monthly users active on a typical day.',
what: 'Per day: users appearing for the first time in the period (new) vs. those active on a later day (returning).',
why: 'Separates audience growth from retention. New/returning are relative to the selected window.',
what: 'Users are grouped by the week of their first visit, then tracked for the % active in each following week.',
why: 'Shows whether new users stick around or churn after their first week.',
what: 'Event volume by weekday and hour of day.',
why: 'Pinpoints peak usage windows for scheduling releases, maintenance, or support.',
what: 'The ten users with the most page views this period. Click a name to drill into their sessions and pages.',
why: 'Spotlights your heaviest users for outreach, feedback, or training.',
what: 'Unique users who accessed the portal each day.',
why: 'Trend and seasonality of who is showing up over time.',
what: 'Total page views recorded each day.',
